message:
test(dispatcher): add non-object/null payload parity cases for tool, http, and log hostcalls

- extension_dispatcher.rs: 3 new test vectors in params_hash_parity test:
  tool-non-object-case (JSON array), http-non-object-case (bare string),
  log-null-case (null) — ensures canonical params hashing fails closed
  when payloads are not the expected JSON object shape
- .beads/issues.jsonl: bd-3ar8v.4.51 status updated open→in_progress

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
